metadata.description: Standards bypass configuration for this branch

bypass.reason: Pure Python bootstrap — no branch imports by design
Circular import — display.py cannot import prax (prax depends on cli). Silent catches are ImportError guard for optional trigger and __main__ error handler.
Dependency-free by design — json_handler cannot import prax (circular: json_handler → prax → cli.display → json_handler). Catch regenerates corrupted JSON silently.
Python dunder convention — __all__ controls public API exports, not a constant to uppercase
Python dunder convention — __all__ controls public API exports, not a constant to uppercase
get_help() and get_introspective() are external API — called by drone, not from within CLI branch
Drone adapter cannot import prax (circular: drone_adapter → cli.main → prax → cli). Catches return graceful fallbacks.
Testing flags same silent catch as silent_catch standard — already bypassed (circular import prevents prax logger)
Testing flags same silent catch as silent_catch standard — already bypassed (dependency-free by design)
Cannot import prax — circular import (prax depends on cli). Documented in code comment.
Cannot import prax — circular import (prax depends on cli). Documented in code comment.
Prax branch detection bug — CLI logs land as unknown_branch. Prax confirmed known limitation (2026-03-23), fix pending on prax side.

notes.usage: Add entries to 'bypass' list to exclude specific violations

example.reason: Circular dependency - logger cannot import CLI

fields.standard: Standard name: cli, imports, naming, etc. (required)
fields.lines: Optional - specific line numbers to bypass
